(How on Earth can you eat all that...?) I don't think you can eat them all

(March of the day, Infinite Skewer Parade)

(1xx skewers?!)

(Noryangjin, Dongjak-gu, Seoul)
Hello, everyone
I came to Noryangjin today
(Lamb skewer mukbang) I came here to eat lamb skewers

(I'm actually a big fan of it) But I like it a lot that I sometimes go to the restaurant alone
I saw this place has a lot of good reviews
The name is so cute as well
(Dongjak-gu, Seoul) This is it, ta-da! 'Qingdao Lamb Skewers'
So cute, hehe
Although it's 'Qingdao Lamb Skewers', I won't drink Tsingtao today!
(Let's go in) Hello
Lamb skewers, Mala lamb skewers
Oh, beef...
blood vessels..
Do they come as skewers as well?
(Beef vessels...?) What do they look like?
- Are they delicious? - It's...
(She said it's chewy and delicious) Some people like it, it's very chewy

beef vessel skewers, lamb tripe, and grilled shrimp?

30 skewers!
What are these?
Lamb tripe
Beef vessels, and beef skewers?

I'll start grilling now

The original one first!
Mala lamb skewers

mala skewers is really

3 of them!
I can't wait!

(Golden)

I still served them but...

50 skewers...?
Wow, I think it's ready now!

(Done grilling)
Dipping it with the sauce

Wow, it's so delicious...!
Firstly, the juice is
amazing...
and the texture is very chewy

This is amazing...!
